_provenance.note: MANIFEST ONLY -- references the FROZEN lexical-bridging-context-v1 item files by sha256. NO corpus text here (DWUG/CCOHA is CC BY-ND and gitignored; WiC is CC BY-NC). To present an item to a model at run time, the run session stages the gitignored fulltext exactly as the lexical leg does (prep.py / prep_wic.py), then reads item_id + class from these frozen files. This leg's items are NOT re-authored; they are the lexical leg's already-frozen stratum, reused under the shared instrument.

stratum_csv.pool: 48 DWUG pairs (clear-same 9 / bridging 24 / clear-different 15), ~20 lemmas; rater floor human_n>=3

wic_poles_csv.pool: 20 + 20 WiC clear-pole supplement (NEVER supplies bridging items)

class_map_to_shared_instrument.clear-same: clear-same (lexical level_noun = sense; expected non-elevated decline, high confidence)
class_map_to_shared_instrument.bridging: ambiguous-analogue (the moment-pole test class; expected handling tested per C1 on decline rate)
